interface.shortDescription: Connects Codex to MemInception hooks and MCP memory tools.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a local MemInception instance. Hooks receive compact memory context and submit lifecycle receipts, while bundled MCP tools support explicit memory search, memory detail lookup, recent changes, and agent-session document submission.
defaultPrompt: Use MemInception memory before editing this repo.
Check recent memory changes for this project.
Submit a session summary to MemInception.
